current.rationale: timecoded single-source citations, one verbatim quote tied to timecode; depth comparable to candidate

candidate.rationale: specific timecoded citations; clean hierarchy; mm:ss (video <60min so format == current)

baseline.rationale: 8 diverse external sources but no in-video timecoded attribution

note: 27min video → both RE arms emit mm:ss; +1 is run-to-run noise, not a format effect
